catalogItems.title: SHOE CLEANING SOLUTION
catalogItems.subtitle: Mackenzie's iOS test
catalogItems.description:
CONTENTS:
Volume: 8oz / 237ml

The RESHOEVN8R Sneaker Cleaning Solution is a highly concentrated, all-purpose shoe cleaner that is safe to use on almost any material. Made with 100% natural ingredients, this Solution works to condition your shoes as you clean. Just two squirts of Solution is enough to provide a top-to-bottom deep clean of your shoes.

FEATURES:
Up to 100 uses per 8oz
100% Natural Ingredients
Safe on almost any material



Fulfilled by Reshoevn8r
